diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -22,18 +22,16 @@
         self.norm0 = features.norm0

         self.relu0 = features.relu0

         # Remove pool0 to keep more spatial resolution (stride 2 instead of 4)

-        # self.pool0 = features.pool0  # skip this

-        

-        self.denseblock1 = features.denseblock1

-        self.transition1 = features.transition1  # stride 4 total

-        self.denseblock2 = features.denseblock2

-        self.transition2 = features.transition2  # stride 8 total

-        self.denseblock3 = features.denseblock3

-        # After denseblock3: 512 channels, stride 8

-        # Don't use transition3 to keep resolution

-        

-        self.norm_out = nn.BatchNorm2d(512)

-        self.proj = nn.Conv2d(512, out_channels, kernel_size=1)

+        

+        self.denseblock1 = features.denseblock1  # 256 ch

+        self.transition1 = features.transition1  # 128 ch, stride 4 total

+        self.denseblock2 = features.denseblock2  # 512 ch

+        self.transition2 = features.transition2  # 256 ch, stride 8 total

+        self.denseblock3 = features.denseblock3  # 1024 ch, stride 8 total

+        # After denseblock3: 1024 channels, stride 8

+        

+        self.norm_out = nn.BatchNorm2d(1024)

+        self.proj = nn.Conv2d(1024, out_channels, kernel_size=1)

         

     def forward(self, x):

         # x: (B, 1, H, W)

@@ -45,7 +43,7 @@
         x = self.transition1(x)  # stride 4

         x = self.denseblock2(x)

         x = self.transition2(x)  # stride 8

-        x = self.denseblock3(x)  # stride 8, 512 channels

+        x = self.denseblock3(x)  # stride 8, 1024 channels

         x = F.relu(self.norm_out(x))

         x = self.proj(x)  # (B, out_channels, H/8, W/8)

         return x

@@ -126,14 +124,16 @@
         self.decoder = nn.TransformerDecoder(decoder_layer, num_layers=num_decoder_layers)

         self.output_proj = nn.Linear(d_model, vocab_size)

         

+        # Initialize weights

         self._init_weights()

         

     def _init_weights(self):

         for p in self.decoder.parameters():

             if p.dim() > 1:

                 nn.init.xavier_uniform_(p)

+        nn.init.xavier_uniform_(self.output_proj.weight)

+        nn.init.zeros_(self.output_proj.bias)

         nn.init.normal_(self.embedding.weight, 0, self.d_model ** -0.5)

-        nn.init.zeros_(self.output_proj.bias)

         

     def encode(self, images):

         """Encode images to memory."""

@@ -144,42 +144,42 @@
         memory = feat.flatten(2).permute(0, 2, 1)  # (B, H'*W', d_model)

         return memory

     

-    def decode(self, memory, tgt_ids, tgt_key_padding_mask=None):

+    def decode(self, memory, tgt, tgt_key_padding_mask=None):

         """Decode with teacher forcing."""

-        T = tgt_ids.size(1)

-        tgt_emb = self.embedding(tgt_ids) * math.sqrt(self.d_model)

+        B, T = tgt.shape

+        tgt_emb = self.embedding(tgt) * math.sqrt(self.d_model)

         tgt_emb = self.pos_enc_1d(tgt_emb)

         

         # Causal mask

-        tgt_mask = nn.Transformer.generate_square_subsequent_mask(T, device=tgt_ids.device)

+        tgt_mask = nn.Transformer.generate_square_subsequent_mask(T, device=tgt.device)

         

         out = self.decoder(

             tgt_emb, memory,

             tgt_mask=tgt_mask,

-            tgt_key_padding_mask=tgt_key_padding_mask,

-            tgt_is_causal=True

+            tgt_key_padding_mask=tgt_key_padding_mask

         )

         logits = self.output_proj(out)  # (B, T, vocab_size)

         return logits

     

-    def forward(self, images, tgt_ids, tgt_key_padding_mask=None):

+    def forward(self, images, tgt, tgt_key_padding_mask=None):

         memory = self.encode(images)

-        logits = self.decode(memory, tgt_ids, tgt_key_padding_mask)

+        logits = self.decode(memory, tgt, tgt_key_padding_mask)

         return logits

     

+    @torch.no_grad()

     def greedy_decode(self, images, sos_id=1, eos_id=2, max_len=200):

         """Greedy decoding."""

+        B = images.size(0)

         memory = self.encode(images)

-        B = images.size(0)

-        device = images.device

         

         # Start with SOS

-        ys = torch.full((B, 1), sos_id, dtype=torch.long, device=device)

-        finished = torch.zeros(B, dtype=torch.bool, device=device)

+        ys = torch.full((B, 1), sos_id, dtype=torch.long, device=images.device)

+        finished = torch.zeros(B, dtype=torch.bool, device=images.device)

         

         for _ in range(max_len):

-            logits = self.decode(memory, ys)  # (B, T, V)

+            logits = self.decode(memory, ys)

             next_token = logits[:, -1, :].argmax(dim=-1)  # (B,)

+            next_token = next_token.masked_fill(finished, 0)  # pad finished

             ys = torch.cat([ys, next_token.unsqueeze(1)], dim=1)

             finished = finished | (next_token == eos_id)

             if finished.all():

@@ -187,9 +187,10 @@
         

         return ys[:, 1:]  # Remove SOS

     

+    @torch.no_grad()

     def beam_search(self, images, sos_id=1, eos_id=2, beam_size=5, max_len=200):

         """Beam search decoding for single image."""

-        assert images.size(0) == 1, "Beam search only supports batch size 1"

+        assert images.size(0) == 1

         device = images.device

         memory = self.encode(images)  # (1, S, d_model)

         memory = memory.expand(beam_size, -1, -1)  # (beam_size, S, d_model)

@@ -202,41 +203,33 @@
             if not beams:

                 break

             

-            # Prepare input

-            seqs = [b[1] for b in beams]

-            max_t = max(len(s) for s in seqs)

-            tgt = torch.zeros(len(seams), max_t, dtype=torch.long, device=device)

-            for i, s in enumerate(seqs):

-                tgt[i, :len(s)] = torch.tensor(s, dtype=torch.long, device=device)

-            

-            mem = memory[:len(beams)]

-            logits = self.decode(mem, tgt)  # (beams, T, V)

-            log_probs = F.log_softmax(logits[:, -1, :], dim=-1)  # (beams, V)

+            # Prepare batch

+            seqs = torch.tensor([b[1] for b in beams], dtype=torch.long, device=device)

+            k = seqs.size(0)

+            mem = memory[:k]

+            

+            logits = self.decode(mem, seqs)  # (k, T, vocab_size)

+            log_probs = F.log_softmax(logits[:, -1, :], dim=-1)  # (k, vocab_size)

             

             new_beams = []

             for i, (score, seq) in enumerate(beams):

-                if seq[-1] == eos_id:

-                    completed.append((score, seq))

-                    continue

-                topk_scores, topk_ids = log_probs[i].topk(beam_size)

-                for s, tid in zip(topk_scores.tolist(), topk_ids.tolist()):

-                    new_beams.append((score + s, seq + [tid]))

+                top_probs, top_ids = log_probs[i].topk(beam_size)

+                for prob, tok in zip(top_probs.tolist(), top_ids.tolist()):

+                    new_score = score + prob

+                    new_seq = seq + [tok]

+                    if tok == eos_id:

+                        completed.append((new_score / len(new_seq), new_seq[1:-1]))

+                    else:

+                        new_beams.append((new_score, new_seq))

             

             # Keep top beam_size

-            new_beams.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)

+            new_beams.sort(key=lambda x: x[0] / len(x[1]), reverse=True)

             beams = new_beams[:beam_size]

-            

-            # Check if all beams ended

-            if all(b[1][-1] == eos_id for b in beams):

-                completed.extend(beams)

-                break

-        

-        completed.extend(beams)

-        if not completed:

-            return []

-        

-        best = max(completed, key=lambda x: x[0])

-        seq = best[1][1:]  # Remove SOS

-        if eos_id in seq:

-            seq = seq[:seq.index(eos_id)]

-        return seq

+        

+        if completed:

+            completed.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)

+            return completed[0][1]

+        elif beams:

+            best = max(beams, key=lambda x: x[0] / len(x[1]))

+            return best[1][1:]  # Remove SOS

+        return []

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -100,7 +100,7 @@
     parser.add_argument('--checkpoint_dir', default='checkpoints')

     parser.add_argument('--resume', default=None)

     parser.add_argument('--label_smoothing', type=float, default=0.1)

-    parser.add_argument('--warmup_epochs', type=int, default=5)

+    parser.add_argument('--warmup_steps', type=int, default=1000)

     args = parser.parse_args()

     

     os.makedirs(args.checkpoint_dir, exist_ok=True)

@@ -147,27 +147,26 @@
     total_params = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())

     print(f'Total parameters: {total_params:,}', flush=True)

     

-    criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(

-        ignore_index=0,

-        label_smoothing=args.label_smoothing

-    )

-    

-    optimizer = optim.AdamW(model.parameters(), lr=args.lr, weight_decay=1e-4)

+    criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(ignore_index=0, label_smoothing=args.label_smoothing)

+    

+    # Use AdamW with warmup + cosine decay

+    optimizer = optim.AdamW(model.parameters(), lr=args.lr, weight_decay=1e-4, betas=(0.9, 0.98))

+    

     scaler = torch.cuda.amp.GradScaler()

     

-    # Warmup + cosine decay scheduler

+    # Warmup + cosine annealing

     total_steps = args.epochs * len(train_loader)

-    warmup_steps = args.warmup_epochs * len(train_loader)

+    warmup_steps = args.warmup_steps

     

     def lr_lambda(step):

         if step < warmup_steps:

             return step / max(1, warmup_steps)

         progress = (step - warmup_steps) / max(1, total_steps - warmup_steps)

-        return 0.5 * (1 + math.cos(math.pi * progress))

-    

-    scheduler = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda)

-    

-    start_epoch = 1

+        return max(0.05, 0.5 * (1 + math.cos(math.pi * progress)))

+    

+    scheduler = optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda)

+    

+    start_epoch = 0

     best_exprate = 0.0

     

     if args.resume:

@@ -177,38 +176,30 @@
             optimizer.load_state_dict(ckpt['optimizer'])

         if 'scheduler' in ckpt:

             scheduler.load_state_dict(ckpt['scheduler'])

-        if 'scaler' in ckpt:

-            scaler.load_state_dict(ckpt['scaler'])

-        start_epoch = ckpt.get('epoch', 0) + 1

+        start_epoch = ckpt.get('epoch', 0)

         best_exprate = ckpt.get('best_exprate', 0.0)

-        print(f'Resumed from epoch {start_epoch-1}, best_exprate={best_exprate:.4f}', flush=True)

-    

-    for epoch in range(start_epoch, args.epochs + 1):

+        print(f'Resumed from epoch {start_epoch}, best_exprate={best_exprate:.4f}', flush=True)

+    

+    for epoch in range(start_epoch, args.epochs):

         t0 = time.time()

         loss = train_epoch(model, train_loader, optimizer, criterion, device, scaler, scheduler)

         

+        # Evaluate every epoch

         val_exprate = compute_exprate(model, val_loader, vocab, id2token, device)

         elapsed = time.time() - t0

         

-        metrics = {

-            'epoch': epoch,

-            'loss': round(loss, 4),

-            'val_exprate': round(val_exprate, 4),

-            'lr': optimizer.param_groups[0]['lr'],

-            'time': round(elapsed, 1)

-        }

+        metrics = {'step': epoch, 'loss': loss, 'val_exprate': val_exprate, 'lr': scheduler.get_last_lr()[0]}

         metrics_file.write(json.dumps(metrics) + '\n')

         metrics_file.flush()

         

-        print(f'Epoch {epoch}/{args.epochs}: loss={loss:.4f}, val_exprate={val_exprate:.4f}, time={elapsed:.1f}s', flush=True)

+        print(f'Epoch {epoch+1}/{args.epochs}: loss={loss:.4f}, val_exprate={val_exprate:.4f}, time={elapsed:.1f}s', flush=True)

         

         # Save checkpoint

         ckpt = {

-            'epoch': epoch,

+            'epoch': epoch + 1,

             'model': model.state_dict(),

             'optimizer': optimizer.state_dict(),

             'scheduler': scheduler.state_dict(),

-            'scaler': scaler.state_dict(),

             'best_exprate': best_exprate,

             'args': {

                 'd_model': args.d_model,

@@ -224,9 +215,8 @@
         

         if val_exprate > best_exprate:

             best_exprate = val_exprate

-            ckpt['best_exprate'] = best_exprate

             torch.save(ckpt, os.path.join(args.checkpoint_dir, 'best.pt'))

-            print(f'New best! val_exprate={best_exprate:.4f}', flush=True)

+            print(f'  New best! val_exprate={best_exprate:.4f}', flush=True)

     

     print(f'Training complete. Best val exprate: {best_exprate:.4f}', flush=True)

     metrics_file.close()
